# Andrey of Gèovan

A member of a hidden order, he is dedicated to eliminating threats that should not exist.

> **Ancestry:** Human
> **Community:** Slyborne
> **Role:** Hunter

## Features

**Track:** Whenever an ally deals damage to an adversary, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Hunter’s Hook:** **Spend 3 tokens** to make an Agility Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, _Andrey_ pulls the target directly into Melee range.

**Precise Strike:** **Spend 3 tokens** to have _Andrey_ deal **2d8** physical damage to an adversary within Melee range.
